citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:35 AM on 10
February 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, calling number on file, and
speaking with the spouse. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:35 AM on 10 
February 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the door, calling number on file, and 
speaking with the spouse. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the 
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
